title: madad #4058
definition:
1) to measure, stretch
    1a) (Qal) to measure
    1b) (Niphal) to be measured
    1c) (Piel)
        1c1) to extend, continue
        1c2) to measure, measure off
    1d) (Po) measured
    1e) (Hithpolel) to extend oneself, stretch oneself
